info.name: Omada Identity Cloud Public API
info.description: Public API of Omada Identity Cloud

item.name: customers
Returns a list of customers that the caller is eligible to view

query.description: the parameter that indicates if terminated customers should be returned - can be used only by Omada principals

response.name: Success

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: Unauthorized

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Update the configuration of an environment. The configuration is always applied as a whole and entirely replaces the current configuration of the environment.

query.description: for testing - overriding the pipeline to be used for configuration

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Use this method to delete an environment

query.description: overriding the id that is being used for the DevOps integration
delete the environment even if it wasn't confirmed that it has been created, yet

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Use this method to lock an environment. Locked environments cannot be deleted. Production environments are locked after every operation and must be unlocked again.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Use this method to unlock an environment. Unlocked environments can be deleted. Production environments are locked after every operation and must be unlocked again.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Suspends the environment to reduce environment quota contribution - a suspended environment cannot be used

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Resumes the environment - only suspended environments can be resumed

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Encrypts a string with the PswEncryptionKey of the environment

query.description: the string which is supposed to be encrypted
needs to be at least eight (8) bytes long

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: long Running Operations
Returns a list of the long running operations for a specific entity type

query.description: supported target types right now are Environment/DeliveryZone
show the history or just the most recent record

response.name: Success
